headline: West Pharmaceutical Services (NYSE:WST) Shows Explosive Potential with Perfect Minervini Trend Template and Accelerating Growth
summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) passes the Minervini Trend Template with perfect moving average alignment and strong relative strength, combined with accelerating 46.9% EPS growth and 21% revenue growth, making it a high-momentum growth stock to watch.
